'''Carolyn Seymour''' (born [[November 6]], [[1940s|1947]]) is an English voice actress who provided the voices for several Star Wars video games.

{{Bio-stub}}

==Star Wars filmography==
*[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]] – [[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker]], [[Unidentified Theed woman 1|Concerned Mother]], [[TC-14/Legends|TC-14]]
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' – AT-AT Barge Pilot, ATC-Frigate, Heavy Lifter Pilot
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' – Empire destroyer captain, Gungan medic, Starbomber pilot
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' – [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' – [[Elora]], [[Helena Shan]], [[Forn Dodonna]], additional voices
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' – [[Terena Adare]], additional voices
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' – Mon Mothma
